description: Social-network (Facebook-like) legacy aggregate targets: PUBLISHED AGGREGATE statistics only (no individual-level data). NOTE: the Facebook friend-degree distribution is NOT a clean power-law (Ugander et al. 2011), so degree_tail_exponent is deliberately OMITTED rather than fabricated. Citation research pass 2026-07-11: named-paper identifiers were verified against arXiv/dblp/official pages (see per-target source_status); numeric values were NOT independently re-verified, and the full metadata schema (population, date range, source hash, tolerance rationale) remains incomplete, so every target stays kind=unsupported and comparison gates stay closed.

clustering.source: High average clustering ~0.6 for the Facebook friendship graph (Ugander, Karrer, Backstrom & Marlow 2011, 'The Anatomy of the Facebook Social Graph')
clustering.verification_note: Ugander et al. 2011 verified via arXiv:1111.4503 on the retrieval date; the abstract confirms 'surprisingly dense' neighborhood clustering but states no numeric coefficient -- the ~0.6 figure is from the paper body, not re-verified here.
clustering.source_title: The Anatomy of the Facebook Social Graph
clustering.tolerance_rationale: scenario_threshold_not_derived: no statistical derivation exists for this tolerance; it is a scenario knob, not a confidence bound
clustering.applicability_limits: aggregate-fit diagnostics only; the numeric value is unverified against any source (null fields above are 'not established', not 'not applicable')
valid_uses: input to the aggregate-fit implausibility diagnostic
synthetic scenario anchoring under stated assumptions
